-----------------------------------------------------------------------  Hi Denys Maiorov, Your order is confirmed! We're getting your order ready for shipping and will notify you when it is shipped.If delivered after May 11, you will get a €5.00 credit within 48 hours. Please quickly double check the address is correct and complete, such as including a house number, since it cannot be changed after the order is shipped.   Ship to:   Terlostraat 32101 2140ANTWERPENBelgium   Change address     Delivery: 5-9 business days (May 5-11)   Get a €5.00 credit within 48 hours if delivered after May 11.   View your order     Anti-Fraud Reminder: Temu does not ask customers for additional fees via SMS or email. We suggest you do not respond and do not open any links without "temu.com" at the site address. Learn more   Order ID: PO-020-10790909694073744   You can click here to view your receipt. We do not include paper receipts to prevent excess packaging waste.         Find us on NOTE: This is an automatically generated email, please do not reply. Office address: First Floor, 25 St Stephens Green, Dublin 2, Ireland Please note, returns will not be accepted at this address. If you want to return items, please request a return and use Temu’s label. Click to view more details. Please contact customer service if you have any questions.
